steps.title: Identify two clear points on the line of best fit
steps.content: Reading directly from the scatterplot, the line passes through approximately $(0, 2)$ at the left and $(4, 9)$ near the middle of the graph. These points lie directly on the line of best fit.

steps.title: Calculate the slope using rise over run
steps.content: Using the slope formula with points $(0, 2)$ and $(4, 9)$: $$m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{9 - 2}{4 - 0} = \frac{7}{4} = 1.75$$ This value is closest to \$2$ among the given choices. That matches choice D — D is correct.
